roadmapPage.title: What we're building
roadmapPage.subtitle: Live status, no vapourware. Updated as features ship and priorities shift.
roadmapPage.feedbackPrompt: Spotted a gap? Drop feedback in
roadmapPage.item_tintTokens_description: Every accent color now has light/dark-tested foreground/background/edge tokens so badges read cleanly in both modes.
roadmapPage.item_focusMode_description: One sidebar button calms ambient animations and collapses secondary panels across the entire app.
roadmapPage.item_strategist_description: Niche-aware Gemini chat backed by 8 playbook libraries, with anti-repetition guarding the suggestion stream.
roadmapPage.item_styleDna_description: The editor now derives your taste from your persisted picks, not just the current edit.
roadmapPage.item_workflowAutoAdvance_description: Stages mark themselves complete as you naturally move forward through Forge → Script → Edit → Schedule → Analyze.
roadmapPage.item_learningLoop_description: Every analytics sync now folds retention deltas back into your weighted style profile.
roadmapPage.item_nicheCapture_description: Picking your category once cascades through every AI surface — strategist, editor, scheduler.
roadmapPage.item_tintSweep_description: A bulk pull request migrating the remaining 200+ pages to the new token system. Awaits CI green and merge.
roadmapPage.item_abVariants_description: Show 3 hook variants per AI suggestion, with the variant you pick feeding back into your weightedHooks profile.
roadmapPage.item_benchmarks_description: Aggregate insights surfaced in the strategist: "creators in your niche posting at 7am LATAM saw 23% higher 7-day retention."
roadmapPage.item_brandConsolidation_description: Pick one top-level brand surface ("Click") and rename ~80% of "Neural"/"Sovereign" labels to action descriptors. Reduces cognitive load for new users.
roadmapPage.item_fineTuning_description: Once your weightedPerformance profile reaches enough samples, an offline pipeline tunes a personal LoRA so every Gemini call is biased to your voice.
roadmapPage.item_teamWorkspaces_description: Shared brand kit, shared style profile, role-based publishing. Foundation exists; UI work pending.
roadmapPage.item_mobileCapture_description: Record + auto-cut + queue from phone, sync to the desktop editor. Unlocks "1-tap publish from where you film."

templatesPage.voidBody: No matching architectural patterns identified within current neural domain.

toolsPage.heading: Every advanced tool, in the editor.
toolsPage.subheading: Silence cutting, filler removal, viral clip extraction, captions, music, background removal, cinematic grading, blog-to-reel, and Descript-style text editing. Click ships them all — every card opens the editor with that tool ready to run on the video you load.

remove-silence.title: AI Pause & Silence Remover
remove-silence.blurb: Detects silent gaps in your recording and tightens the cut. Three sensitivity levels and a min-gap slider.

remove-fillers.title: Cut Recording Mistakes
remove-fillers.blurb: Strips "um / uh / like / you know" plus dead air. One-click clean-up powered by the auto-edit pipeline.

long-to-short.title: Long → Viral Short Clips
long-to-short.blurb: Auto-edit converts long-form footage into multiple platform-ready vertical clips, ranked by predicted virality.

background-music.title: Add Background Music
background-music.blurb: Auto-pick from a curated music library or generate AI music sized to your clip. Beat-synced cuts and ducking included.

background-removal.title: AI Background Removal & Effects
background-removal.blurb: Chroma key, masking, motion graphics, color curves, EQ + ducking. Full effects suite in the manual editor.

blog-to-reel.title: Blog / Video → Marketing Reel
blog-to-reel.blurb: Paste a blog post or drop a video — Click drafts platform-specific reels, captions, and hashtags in one pass.

captions.title: Auto Subtitles + Online Editor
captions.blurb: Whisper-grade transcription, multi-language captions, word-level timing, and an inline editor that syncs to playback.

edit-by-text.title: Edit by Editing Text
edit-by-text.blurb: Descript-style. Mark seconds-ranges to keep — the video re-cuts to match. Lives next to the timeline in the editor.

cinematic.title: 3D Style & Cinematic Effects
cinematic.blurb: Cinematic color grade, film grain, 3D tilt/zoom, motion-blur, beat-synced transitions. Apply per-clip from the editor.

trendsPage.title: Neural Radar
trendsPage.intro: Autonomous trend detection synthesized from 400M+ data points across the creator economy. Identify viral patterns before they peak.

Each subsequent scene generation prompt receives a continuity enforcement block — so the coffee cup doesn't vanish and the laptop stays consistent across all 4 camera angles.
